identity.name: Swiss Admin
identity.vibe: The interface should feel like a digital sheet of high-quality A4 paper. Objective, grid-based, and distraction-free.

rules: Use 'tracking-tight' for all headings larger than 24px.
Use 'tracking-wider' for all table headers and overlines.
Data numbers (Taxa, Total) must use tabular-nums or the Mono font for alignment.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous. Use p-6 or p-8 for card padding. Gap-6 for grids.

grid_system.paper_container: max-w-[210mm] mx-auto bg-white shadow-sm min-h-[297mm] p-8

buttons.style: Sharp or minimal radius (rounded-sm). High contrast.

inputs.style: Flat, 1px border. Focus ring should be sharp.

tables.style: Swiss Style. Minimal borders. Emphasis on alignment.
tables.header: border-b border-zinc-900 text-zinc-900 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs

cards.style: Flat, subtle border, no shadow or very minimal shadow.

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: None. Use solid opacity for print reliability.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise allowed on the login page background only.

motion.hover_effects: Subtle lift or color shift. No massive scaling.

accessibility.contrast: WCAG AA compliant. Text must be Zinc-900 on White.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements.

images.description: Minimalist white architecture with geometric shadows. Use for Login Page split layout.

assets.icons: Lucide React (default). Use thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}) for elegance.

general: Implement a strict Light Mode. Do not add a Dark Mode toggle as this is a print-first app.
Use the 'Manrope' font for all headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Import them via Google Fonts in index.css.
The Dashboard should feel like a workspace. Use a light gray background (#f4f4f5) for the app, and pure white (#ffffff) for the content containers (tables/forms).
Ensure the 'Taxa' and 'Total' columns in tables are right-aligned and use tabular figures.
For the 'Membri' table, the 'Prezent' checkbox must be easily clickable.
The 'Invitati' table must be fully editable (inputs inside cells) except for the ID.
Implement a 'Print' button that triggers window.print(). Use CSS @media print to hide the sidebar, header, and buttons, leaving only the tables and date.

pages.login: Split screen layout. Left side: Login form (clean, minimal). Right side: The architectural image provided.
pages.dashboard: Sidebar navigation (left). Top header (Date display). Main content area with Tabs for 'Membri' and 'Invitati'.
pages.members_management: A separate view (CRUD) to add/edit/delete members. Keep it consistent with the dashboard style.

components.date_display: Prominent display in the top right (e.g., 'Joi, 24 Octombrie 2024').
components.tables: Use the Shadcn Table component. Customize it to remove the default 'muted' look and make it high-contrast for print.

universal_guidelines: Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
Do not use gradients. Use solid colors and borders.
